demographic_profile.summary: Product managers are analytical professionals who synthesize data from multiple sources including user feedback platforms like Zendesk and analytics dashboards to make informed product decisions. They are driven by the need to balance user needs with business objectives while maintaining alignment across cross-functional teams including engineering, design, and executive stakeholders. Their primary frustrations center around incomplete or conflicting data, stakeholder misalignment, and the challenge of prioritizing features when resources are limited and user feedback is overwhelming or contradictory.
